form.formComment: Form hard to fault. At the latest run sat on the speed and boxed on steadily 2nd of 9 at Dalby 2yo+ Mdn-Sw on March 21 over 1000m, 0.5 len behind Bronze Memory carrying 59.5kg at $2.10. The race before that held ground to the line 2nd of 10 at Toowoomba Mdn-Sw on March 7 over 1100m, 1.5 len behind Magic Moz with 58.5kg at $4.60. Big chance to break through.

Rates highly and expected to go close.
